name: neo-skeuo
description: Neo-skeuomorphic UI kit — design tokens, CSS primitives, and framework adapters
author: haithanh079

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @neo-skeuo/tokens && npm run build -w @neo-skeuo/assets && npm run build -w @neo-skeuo/react && npm run build -w @neo-skeuo/antd && npm run build -w @neo-skeuo/refine && npm run build -w @neo-skeuo/vue && npm run build -w @neo-skeuo/ant-design-vue && npm run build -w @neo-skeuo/react-native
scripts.test:packages: npm run test -w @neo-skeuo/tokens && npm run test -w @neo-skeuo/react
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @neo-skeuo/tokens && npm run typecheck -w @neo-skeuo/react && npm run typecheck -w @neo-skeuo/antd && npm run typecheck -w @neo-skeuo/refine && npm run typecheck -w @neo-skeuo/vue && npm run typecheck -w @neo-skeuo/react-native && npm run typecheck -w @neo-skeuo/assets
